case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. OKPRO INTERNATIONAL LLC ET AL

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100195194) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OKPRO INTERNATIONAL LLC DBA OKPRO INTERNATIONAL & LOGISTIC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2023
DECLARATION CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100211037) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
